title: Bihar Police BPSSC ASI Operation Online Form 2026
post_name: BPSSC Assistant Sub Inspector ASI Operation Recruitment 2026 Apply Online for 462 Post

fees.Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commis: For Selection of Assistant Sub-Inspector (Operation) in Bihar Police Radio (Wireless), Govt. of Bihar Notification 2026 and Invited Online Application Form for the BPSSC ASI Advt No 04/2026 Candidate Can Apply Online for 04/02/2026 to 04/03/2026.

fee_payment_method: Pay the Exam Fee Through Online Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, UPI Fee Mode Only
age_relaxation_notes: Read the Notification for Age Relaxation in BPSSC Advt. No.-04/2026: For Selection of Assistant Sub-Inspector (Operation) in Bihar Police Radio (Wireless), Govt. of Bihar.
how_to_apply: Bihar Police Subordinate Services Commission (BPSSC) Are Issued Advt. No.-04/2026: For Selection of Assistant Sub-Inspector (Operation) in Bihar Police Radio (Wireless), Govt. of Bihar Notification 2026 and Invited Online Application Form for the BPSSC ASI Advt No 04/2026 Candidate Can Apply Online for 04/02/2026 to 04/03/2026.
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the BPSSC Latest ASI Recruitment 2026 Application Form in Sarkari Result Recruitment Latest Job Section.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID, Thumb, Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
